gist.headline: Excel at Excel
gist.blurb: We just added excelformula.pro to the community greenhouse! Now you can turn plain English into complex spreadsheet formulas without breaking a sweat.
gist.summary: Added excelformula.pro to the community apps showcase, a tool that generates ready-to-use Excel formulas from natural language.
gist.impact: Users can now easily discover a tool to translate plain English descriptions or sample data into working spreadsheet formulas.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about Excel formulas and spreadsheets. Visual symbols: spreadsheets, grids, cells, math symbols, the pollinations bee. The bee could be looking at a glowing green spreadsheet grid, maybe holding a magic wand or a calculator.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a glowing green spreadsheet grid on a retro computer monitor. The bee is holding a tiny magic wand that turns text into math symbols. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
